title: Puy Lentil Stew
description: A simple and comforting stew made with puy lentils, wholesome vegetables, and a touch of buttery goodness.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large bowl over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the puy lentils, wholesome broth, salt, and black pepper to the bowl.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the lentils are tender, about 30 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
